identity.mission: Create a production-grade Enterprise ERP that breaks the 'boring admin panel' stereotype. Prioritize density, clarity, and authority (Swiss Style) over generic SaaS gradients.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss Print Design with High-Performance Cockpit UI.
Information Density: Every pixel must earn its rent. No massive empty spaces in tables.
Role-Based Context: The UI changes based on who is looking (Admin vs Driver).
No Center-Everything: Align left for speed reading. Asymmetry creates tension.

design_philosophy.visual_style: Stark contrast, heavy use of borders, grid lines, and monochromatic foundations with sharp functional accents.
anti_patterns: No 'Inter' for Headings (Use Plus Jakarta Sans).
No centered text in data tables or forms.

primary.name: International Klein Blue
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, Active States, Key Metrics

sidebar.style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full border-r border-slate-200 bg-slate-900 text-white z-40

customization_rules: Radius: Rounded-md (6px) or Rounded-sm (4px) for a tighter, technical feel.
Shadows: shadow-sm or shadow-none with border-opacity-100.
Cards: Border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200.

specific_components.Button: Sharp corners or slight rounding (rounded-md). No pill shapes for primary actions.
specific_components.Table: Dense. py-2 px-3 for cells. Stripes: even:bg-slate-50. Header: uppercase text-xs font-bold tracking-wider text-slate-500.
specific_components.Badge: Flat with border. No solid bright blobs. Use 'outline' variant often.
specific_components.Dialog: Backdrop blur-sm. Sharp modal with clear header separation.

visual_enhancements.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers or floating overlays (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80).
visual_enhancements.gradients: BANNED for backgrounds. Allowed only for subtle 'active' borders or data viz areas.
visual_enhancements.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the sidebar to reduce digital flatness.

motion.page_load: opacity-0 to opacity-100 y-4 to y-0

fleet.list_view: Dense table with 'Status' pills (Moving, Idle, Maintenance).
fleet.detail_view: Header with large Vehicle ID. Tabs for 'Telematics', 'Service', 'Docs'.
fleet.gps_simulation: Use a map placeholder with animated markers.

utilities.charts: Bar charts for monthly consumption. Line charts for year-over-year comparison.
utilities.bill_entry: Split form: Left side image of bill (upload), right side data entry fields.

documents.versioning_ui: Timeline view showing 'Current' vs 'Archived' versions of insurance/docs.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use generic 'lorem ipsum' in final mockups. Use realistic data (e.g., 'MH-02-DN-4921', 'Tata Power', 'Invoice #9921').
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit'`).
Use `framer-motion` for page transitions and micro-interactions (e.g., button click scale).
Error states must be descriptive. Red border + Red text message below input.
Loading states: Use Skeleton loaders (Shadcn `Skeleton`), not just spinners.
Mobile Responsiveness: All tables must have a card-view fallback or horizontal scroll on mobile.
Do NOT use 'transparent' background on dropdowns or headers overlaying content.
